name: Deluxe Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and cocoa powder (if using).
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk if needed, until just combined.
6. Fold in chopped nuts if desired.
7. Spread the batter evenly into a greased jelly roll pan.
8. Bake for 15 - 18 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and sprinkle miniature marshmallows evenly over the cake.
10. Return the pan to the oven for an additional 2 - 3 minutes, just until the marshmallows are lightly melted and golden.
11. Use a knife dipped in water to spread any remaining melted marshmallow topping evenly over the bars.
12. Allow to cool completely at room temperature.
13. For the topping: In a small saucepan, melt chocolate chips, butter, and peanut butter over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth and well blended. Remove from heat and stir in the crispy rice cereal.
14. Spread the topping mixture evenly over the cooled bars.
15. Chill for at least 30 minutes before cutting into bars.
Makes about 36 bars.
